audit_items.proof_trace: The file contains no pointer dereferences. The single function ber_pvt_wsa_err2string(int err) accepts a value-type int and returns compile-time string literals produced by the LBER_RETSTR macro (C preprocessor stringification #x) or the fallback "unknown WSA error" — all guaranteed non-NULL by the C standard. No heap allocations, struct member accesses, or pointer arithmetic exist in the file.
